Let’s Recall 	4. The brook uses sound words like “chatter” and “______”. 	(a) whisper 	(b) babble 	(c) shout 	(d) cryB. Complete the following lines   	1. I steal by __________________, 2. I slip, I slide, ____________________/ 	 __________________________  Among my ______________________; 	 I move the ____________________  I make the netted sunbeams dance 	 That grows __________________.  __________________________________C. Answer the following questions with reference to the context. CG:2, C:2.2 	1. I wind about, and in and out,	Critical Thinking 	 With here a blossom sailing,  	 And here and there a lusty trout,  	 And here and there a grayling.Name the poem and the poet.Who is ‘I’ here?What movement is described here?What things are mentioned in the above lines? 	2. I make the netted sunbeams dance  	 Against my sandy shallows. 	 I murmur under moon and stars 	 In brambly wildernesses; 	 I linger by my shingly bars;  	 I loiter round my cresses.How do netted sunbeams dance?What change comes in the movement of brook at night?What do shingly bars refer to?Write the rhyming scheme of the poem.	Put on Your Thinking Caps	 	/The poem throws light on the temporariness of human life while the natural things are permanent. Still there have been many similarities between the life of brook and human life. Write a short note describing the theme of the poem.	Dictionary & Vocabulary Skills	  	/Without opening your dictionary, guess which word would appear first. Then check from the dictionary. 	a. river / ripple 	b. valley / vanish 	c. meadow / meaning 	d. brook / bridgePersonification is a figure of speech where non-living things are shown to have qualities of a living being.  Find out examples of the given figures of speech from the poem:Look for words  (i) Alliteration ___________________________________________ that show the  (ii) Repetition ____________________________________________ brook behaving like a human  (iii) Personification ________________________________________ being.
